articles.excerpt: World models for interactive video generation have largely focused on single-agent settings, where future observations are generated from a single control signal. However, many generated environments require multi-agent interaction: multiple players, robots, or embodied agents act simultaneously within a shared space. Scaling world models to such settings requires a principled multi-agent design:
articles.summary: 针对单智能体世界模型在多人、多机器人场景中的局限，提出Gamma-World，一种生成式多智能体世界模型，支持多个控制信号同时生成未来观测，适用于交互式视频生成和仿真环境。

articles.title: Self-Improving Language Models with Bidirectional Evolutionary Search
articles.excerpt: Search has been proposed as an effective method for self-improving language models and agentic systems, both for post-training sample generation and for inference. However, widely used methods such as best-of-N sampling and tree search face two fundamental limitations: they are guided by sparse verification signals, and they construct candidates primarily through autoregressive expansion, restrict
articles.summary: 提出双向进化搜索方法，用于语言模型自我改进。该方法通过双向搜索和密集验证信号，克服传统best-of-N和树搜索的稀疏性限制，提升后训练和推理阶段的样本生成效率与质量。

articles.title: OmniVerifier-M1: Multimodal Meta-Verifier with Explicit Structured Recalibration
articles.excerpt: Visual outcomes are increasingly central to multimodal large language models, making reliable and fine-grained verification essential for scaling generalist foundation models. In this work, we investigate multimodal meta-verification, which leverages verifier-generated rationales rather than decision-only signals, and explore how to effectively incorporate meta-verification feedback into multimoda
articles.summary: 提出OmniVerifier-M1多模态元验证器，通过利用验证器生成的推理链进行结构化重校准，实现细粒度验证，提升多模态大语言模型在视觉任务中的可靠性和可扩展性。

articles.title: Agent Explorative Policy Optimization for Multimodal Agentic Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Vision-language models with extended reasoning succeed on complex problems, but many real-world problems require external tools that internal reasoning alone often cannot resolve. Agentic reasoning therefore interleaves two behaviors with a structural asymmetry: thinking (the self-contained default) and tool use (a high-variance auxiliary acting). We refer to this asymmetry as the Thinking-Acting
articles.summary: 针对视觉-语言模型在代理推理中思考与工具使用的不对称性，提出Agent Explorative Policy Optimization，通过强化学习有效结合内部推理和外部工具调用，提升复杂任务完成能力。

articles.title: Rethinking Memory as Continuously Evolving Connectivity
articles.excerpt: Existing memory-augmented LLM agents often treat memory as a static repository with pre-defined representations and fixed retrieval pipelines, which is brittle in dynamic agentic environments where feedback, task variation, and heterogeneous signals continuously reshape what should be remembered and how it should be connected. To address this, we propose FluxMem, a connectivity-evolving memory fra
articles.summary: 针对传统静态记忆在动态环境中的脆弱性，提出FluxMem，一种连接不断演化的记忆框架，能够根据反馈和任务变化动态调整记忆连接，提升LLM代理的适应性和鲁棒性。

articles.title: OSP-Next: Efficient High-Quality Video Generation with Sparse Sequence Parallelism, HiF8 Quantization, and Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Diffusion Transformers achieve strong video generation quality, but the quadratic cost of full attention limits efficiency. We introduce OSP-Next, an efficient text-to-video generation model that integrates sparse attention, parallelism, quantization, and reinforcement learning. OSP-Next uses a hybrid full-sparse attention architecture, where the sparse component is implemented with Skiparse-2D At
articles.summary: 提出OSP-Next高效文本生成视频模型，采用混合全稀疏注意力架构（Skiparse-2D Attention），结合稀疏序列并行、HiF8量化和强化学习，在降低二次注意力计算成本的同时保持高质量视频生成。

articles.title: GUI-CIDER: Mid-training GUI Agents via Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection
articles.excerpt: Despite the rapid progress of multimodal large language models in building Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents, their real-world task completion is fundamentally bottlenecked by a lack of world knowledge about GUI operations. Existing solutions typically rely on expensive multi-agent scaffolding or conventional post-training paradigms, such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learn
articles.summary: 提出GUI-CIDER，针对多模态大语言模型GUI代理缺乏操作知识的问题，通过因果内化和密度感知示例重选进行中期训练，无需昂贵的多代理脚手架即可提升任务完成能力。

articles.title: DenoiseRL: Bootstrapping Reasoning Models to Recover from Noisy Prefixes
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning has become a central paradigm for advancing reasoning in large language models, yet most existing methods still depend on stronger teacher models or heavily curated difficult datasets, limiting scalable capability improvement. In this paper, we introduce DenoiseRL, a reinforcement learning framework that substitutes external supervision with recovery-oriented optimization ov
articles.summary: 提出DenoiseRL框架，通过从噪声前缀中恢复的强化学习优化替代外部监督，使语言模型在推理任务中自我提升，避免依赖强教师模型或困难数据集。

articles.title: Hybrid Neural World Models
articles.excerpt: Neural surrogates promise large speedups over classical solvers for physical dynamics but fail silently at sharp dynamical events such as shocks, fronts, and contact. We present hybrid neural world models for physical dynamics: a recipe for training and deploying multi-horizon surrogates in physical state space, where a single network with continuous horizon conditioning is trained with direct sup
articles.summary: 提出混合神经世界模型，在物理状态空间中训练多视野替代模型。通过单一网络连续视野条件处理冲击、接触等尖锐事件，大幅加速物理动力学仿真同时保持可靠性。

articles.title: ProRL: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Proactive Recommendation via Rectified Policy Gradient Estimation
articles.excerpt: Proactive Recommender Systems (PRSs) aim to guide user preference shift toward target items by generating paths of intermediate recommendations. Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a principled framework for optimizing such sequential decision tasks, as path rewards can naturally capture both short-term acceptance and long-term guidance effectiveness. However, naively applying policy gradients to
articles.summary: 提出ProRL，针对主动推荐系统使用修正策略梯度估计优化强化学习。该方法有效捕捉路径的短期接受和长期引导效果，提升推荐系统引导用户偏好转移的性能。

articles.title: Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as the standard paradigm for improving reasoning capability of large language models, while Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has been a widely adopted module in pretraining. Combining them is a natural approach, yet current RL practices detach MTP gradients because joint training degrades the performance. We revisit this failure from an
articles.summary: 针对RLVR与多标记预测联合训练导致性能下降的问题，通过分析梯度冲突，提出最优系数校准方法，实现两者有效结合，提升大语言模型推理能力。

articles.title: Long Live The Balance: Information Bottleneck Driven Tree-based Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in online reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising performance in complex reasoning tasks. However, they often exhibit an imbalanced exploration-exploitation trade-off, resulting in unstable optimization and sub-optimal performance. We introduce IB-Score, a novel metric grounded in Information Bottleneck theory that evaluates policy's
articles.summary: 针对在线强化学习中探索-利用失衡问题，引入基于信息瓶颈理论的IB-Score指标，驱动树搜索策略优化，实现更稳定的训练和更优的复杂推理任务性能。

articles.title: ResearchMath-14K: Scaling Research-Level Mathematics via Agents
articles.excerpt: The frontier of mathematics is defined by problems whose solutions are not yet known, yet it remains unclear whether language models can meaningfully engage with such problems without human intervention. A major obstacle is the lack of large-scale research-level math datasets. To this end, we introduce ResearchMath-14k, a set of 14{,}056 problems curated from academic sources via a multi-agent pip
articles.summary: 推出ResearchMath-14K数据集，包含14056个来自学术来源的研究级数学问题，通过多智能体管道筛选。该数据集填补了语言模型处理未解决问题所需的规模空白，推动数学推理研究。

articles.title: PortBench: A Correlation-Aware, Full-Pipeline Benchmark for LLM-Driven Portfolio Management
articles.excerpt: LLMs have shown strong performance across diverse financial tasks, yet portfolio management (PM), a critical financial decision-making task, remains poorly benchmarked. Existing benchmarks exhibit two main gaps: they ignore cross-asset correlation structures, thereby failing to distinguish genuinely diversified portfolios from concentrated ones, and fail to evaluate the complete PM decision pipeli
articles.summary: 提出PortBench，一种考虑跨资产相关性的全管道基准，用于评估LLM驱动的投资组合管理。该基准弥补了现有工作在资产多样性和完整决策评估上的不足，更准确衡量LLM在金融决策中的能力。

articles.title: GE-Sim 2.0: A Roadmap Towards Comprehensive Closed-loop Video World Simulators for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: We introduce GE-Sim 2.0 (Genie Envisioner World Simulator 2.0), a closed-loop video world simulator for robotic manipulation.
